summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Alpha Agency website corrections. All requested features are working perfectly: homepage with Guadeloupe hero image, favicon visibility, admin access via triple-click, documents management with PDF generation, portfolio page showing 8 items, settings page without KPIs tab, and consistent light theme across all dashboard pages.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with beautiful Guadeloupe island/ocean hero background image
Favicon correctly configured and visible in browser tab
Page title shows 'Alpha Agency - Agence de communication digitale 360° en Guadeloupe'
Hero section with proper headline 'Votre présence digitale commence ici'
6 service cards displayed correctly on homepage
Hero CTA buttons (Demander un devis, Découvrir nos offres) functional
Triple-click on footer logo successfully redirects to /alpha-admin-2024
Admin login with admin@alphagency.fr / superpassword works perfectly
Dashboard loads with light theme (white background: rgb(255, 255, 255))
Documents page (/admin/documents) accessible and functional
Documents page shows existing documents in table format with proper columns
Document creation modal opens with 'Nouveau document' button
Document type selector shows 2 types (Lettre de mission, Fiche de contact)
Document templates available (8 total: 6 for Lettre de mission, 2 for Fiche de contact)
PDF download functionality available in document action menus
Portfolio page (/admin/realisations) shows '8 réalisations au total'
Portfolio items displayed correctly with categories and descriptions
Portfolio page includes 'Nouvelle réalisation' button
Settings page (/admin/parametres) has correct 4 tabs only
Settings tabs: Entreprise, Réseaux sociaux, Pages légales, Intégrations
KPIs tab correctly removed from settings page
Light theme consistency across all dashboard pages verified
All navigation links working (Contacts, Pipeline, Devis, Factures, Abonnements)
Backend API tests: 20/20 passed (100% success rate)
All CRUD operations working for contacts, opportunities, quotes, documents
Document types API returns correct structure with 8 templates
Dashboard stats and authentication working properly
